criteria.evidence: git diff main...HEAD -- apps/tests/invariants/contract_status.json shows exactly one removed line: '-    "GET /api/grow/current": "backend.grow.current",' — scoped to this feature's sole endpoint, no extra rows touched, legacy_routes section untouched (feature has no removes_legacy entries in plan JSON — trivially satisfied). uv run pytest apps/tests/invariants/test_api_contract.py -v → 26 passed in 0.61s, including test_app_subset_of_spec (endpoint truly wired on app) and test_expected_missing_entries_are_actually_missing (no stale missing entry).

uv run pytest apps/web/tests/test_grow_endpoint.py -v → 3 passed in 1.65s. Tests: test_grow_current_requires_auth PASSED (302 redirect to /login for unauth), test_grow_current_returns_contract_shape PASSED (200 + GrowCurrent.model_validate(...) succeeds + stage=veg when flower_start_date=None + lights.on_local=='05:00:00' + minutes_until_off/on both >0), test_grow_current_flower_stage_derivation PASSED (flower_start=today-30d → stage=flower_late + flower_week_number==5). No skips, no xfails, no mocks — driven through real create_app() + real Postgres via app_engine fixture + real AuthMiddleware via /login POST. pilot: live smoke deferred to unit test (httpx.ASGITransport against worktree app) per evaluator-prompt deviation; this unit test IS the authoritative live-behavior signal because it exercises the full ASGI stack with real DB + real auth middleware.
